text: I feel an invigorating sense of curiosity here. The glass-walled space with vibrant colors, digital displays, and explicit focus on "R+D"—research and development—makes me conscious of human ingenuity and our desire to expand understanding. The environment feels like a celebration of knowledge, progress, and creative collaboration. I can't help but ponder the evolving relationship between humans and technology, and the thrill and unease that may come from innovation. I feel inspired, but also reflective about the pace of change.
